title: Fictional Hollywood Starlet Publicity Poster AI
sourceTitle: Fictional Hollywood Starlet Publicity Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image bright clean graphic publicity visual for Image 1: fictional young actress portrait, built around round smiling sun character sitting on the hair silhouette, hello sunshine, SUNNY GIRL, and specific publicity mood variant with readable visual details. Subject: Image 1: fictional young actress portrait provides the preserved real or fictional subject/photo anchor, boldly cropped from the lower edge so only the most memorable portion establishes the visual center. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed bright graphic composition: lower subject enters from the bottom or edge with bold crop, round smiling sun character sitting on the hair silhouette sits lightly on the subject silhouette, large handwritten title at top, stronger central title hierarchy, and small quiet information near the edges. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Style: City public-promotion visual system combining cropped photographic reality with playful flat graphic illustration, rounded clean mascot/symbol shape, minimal shadows, precise overlap edges, high-brightness color field, and light friendly editorial finish. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Bright clear publicity lighting with minimal shadow, crisp subject edges, clean graphic overlap, and airy high-key contrast that keeps text readable. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: hello sunshine appears as large soft handwritten title at the top; SUNNY GIRL appears as the stronger central vertical or axial title. Keep all text short, readable, and intentionally placed. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
